/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -msse2  -g CMakeFiles/test_gHammingMatch.dir/test_gHammingMatch_generated_test_gHammingMatch.cu.o -o test_gHammingMatch   -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64 /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudadevrt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
